Aliases_in_paper.description: List of known aliases or synonyms associated with the gene found in the paper.

bullet_point.description: A concise bullet-point summary describing the direct evidence about the gene.

evidence_location.description: Where in the paper the evidence can be found (e.g., Figure 1, Table 2, Results paragraph 3, Supplementary, or Discussion paragraph 5).

supporting_quotes.description: Up to 2 direct quotes from the paper that support the summary bullet point.

GeneSummary.description: Bullet points from the <Gene Summary> section, each with its own paired evidence location and supporting quotes.

AdditionalInferences.description: Bullet points from the <Additional Inferences> section, capturing inferred conclusions not directly evidenced.

ShortSummary.description: The one sentence <Short Summary> that captures key findings.

only_in_passing.description: Flags if gene is only mentioned in passing without substantial findings - TRUE if so, FALSE if not.
